arts.ttl: Aston Villa told what they'll be getting when signing finally arrives next summer
arts.sum: Iling-Junior thinks where he is best suited to play is dependent on the manager in charge of him in that moment and what they're wanting to extract from him within the unit, but clearly he is a player who is flexible and capable over covering multiple positions - a useful trait for any manager, particularly someone like Unai Emery, who himself looks to adapt and whose workload by way of the fixture list is substantial. BirminghamLive has launched its very own WhatsApp community to give you the opportunity to receive the latest Aston Villa news straight to your messages.

arts.ttl: Sir Alex Ferguson's fresh snub as he names Aston Villa man amongst his top Man United captains
arts.sum: Fergie omitted Keane's name while heralding Bryan Robson and former4 Villa boss Steve Bruce - even acknowledging non-official captain Edwin van der Sar over Keane, who led United for eight years. Sir Alex Ferguson has left Roy Keane off his list of top captains, despite the former Aston Villa assistant boss's prominent role at Manchester United during the club's glory years.

arts.ttl: Christian Benteke still making shockwaves as Aston Villa favourite beats Lionel Messi to accolade
arts.sum: Former Aston Villa favourite Christian Benteke has finished the Major League Soccer season as leading goalscorer, beating the likes of Lionel Messi and Luis Suarez to the golden boot award. arts.ttl: The brutal message that turned failing Aston Villa player into key man under Unai Emery
arts.sum: Lucas Digne has arguably been Aston Villa's most consistent player since the start of last season, something which Unai Emery might not have expected when he first arrived at the club. The left-back scored in Emery's first game in charge of Villa - the 3-1 win over Manchester United - but lost his place in the starting XI shortly after the New Year following the arrival of Alex Moreno from Real Betis.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa braced for blow as striker walks tightrope
arts.sum: The Colombian has picked up two yellow cards in the club's first two league phase fixtures against BSC Young Boys and Bayern Munich despite only featuring for 50 minutes across both matches after coming off the bench. Duran was booked in the 95th minute against Vincent Kompany's side and will miss the next league phase game Villa play if he picks up another yellow card.

arts.ttl: 'Villa made me feel wanted' | Iling-Junior eyeing spot in Emery's plans
arts.sum: Eyebrows were raised when Samuel Iling-Junior headed back to Italy shortly after joining Aston Villa this summer - but the Chelsea academy graduate is determined to carve a way into Unai Emery's plans.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery eyeing double transfer swoop to fix key Aston Villa problem
arts.sum: Also Morgan Rogers has been an integral cog in the machine, though Emery will know better than most about the risks of relying so heavily on the 22-year-old for almost every minute of action played to date. This all stems from the decision to not sign an attacker or creative spark after the departure of Moussa Diaby late in the summer transfer window, however the latest rumours suggest the club have been biding their time to find the correct replacement - multiple, in fact.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs Bologna predictions: Villa can continue perfect start
arts.sum: Aston Villa and Bologna have made contrasting starts to the season, both domestically and in Europe and Alex jack expects the current trends to continue on Tuesday night

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Arsenal, Newcastle & Aston Villa among transfer suitors for €35m playmaker
arts.sum: Arsenal, Newcastle United and Aston Villa are understood to be showing strong interest in the potential transfer of Red Bull Salzburg playmaker Oscar Gloukh, who is valued at around €35million by his club.
